subtasks.description: Query SAM MongoDB to retrieve Slack contract renewal data including renewal dates, license count, contract terms, and vendor renewal terms
Query consumption data warehouse to extract Slack usage trends over time, including active users, seat utilization rate, and usage patterns (daily/monthly metrics)

Reconcile SAM renewal contract dates and license counts with consumption usage trends to identify trajectory alignment, forecast future renewal needs, and assess renewal posture (over-provisioned, under-provisioned, right-sized)

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) mongo_query to extract SAM renewal contract details (mid-tier for filtering and field aggregation), (2) sql_gen for consumption warehouse queries producing multi-metric usage trends (mid-tier for joins and time-series aggregation), (3) cross_recon at frontier tier to reconcile two data sources with temporal alignment, calculate trajectory divergence, classify renewal posture (over/under/right-sized), and generate actionable renewal forecasts. The frontier tier is necessary because cross-recon must synthesize conflicting signals from two sources, apply time-series analysis, and produce probabilistic renewal recommendations.

output.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS usage_month, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) AS active_days FROM consumption_facts WHERE product ILIKE '%slack%' AND event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) ORDER BY usage_month
